summary: internal/azure/azure.go honors AZURE_FUNCTIONS_ADMIN_ARM_TOKEN: a pre-acquired ARM bearer token used directly by every client, skipping per-process DefaultAzureCredential/`az` calls.
reason: The live-dogfood matrix runs commands in parallel; each process shelling out to `az account get-access-token` contended on the Azure CLI token cache and intermittently failed. One shared token is concurrency-safe and CI-friendly.
validated_outcome: With the token set, the full live matrix passes 69/0 with no auth flakiness; unset, DefaultAzureCredential behaves exactly as before.
